meta.name: dj_track_similarity_clap_project_prompt_bank
meta.notes: Project-aligned CLAP prompt bank. Adaptive is intentionally excluded.

prompts: broken beat electronic music.
This audio is a broken beat electronic track.
This audio is a syncopated drum track.
A club electronic track with syncopated drums, broken rhythm, dry percussion, and tight low-end.
An electronic dance track with shuffled breakbeats, off-grid percussion, and a restless rhythmic groove.
hard_negatives: This audio is a straight four-on-the-floor house track.
This audio is beatless ambient drone music.
This audio is a vocal pop song.
This audio is acoustic folk music.

prompts: deep warm-up electronic music.
This audio is a deep warm-up club track.
This audio is a restrained deep house track.
A low-energy electronic club track with warm bass, muted drums, spacious texture, and a patient groove.
A subtle late-night warm-up track with deep low-end, soft percussion, and understated atmosphere.
hard_negatives: This audio is peak-time techno with aggressive drums.
This audio is a bright vocal pop song.
This audio is high-energy EDM with big drops.
This audio is rock music with electric guitars.

prompts: vocals and speech.
This audio contains prominent singing vocals.
This audio contains spoken word or speech.
A music track with clear lead vocals, spoken phrases, or voice-focused sections.
A vocal-forward audio recording with speech, rap, chanting, or singing as a prominent element.
hard_negatives: This audio is an instrumental electronic dance track.
This audio is beatless ambient instrumental music.
This audio is a percussion-focused club track.
This audio is an instrumental acoustic performance.

prompts: vocal music track.
This audio is a music track with vocals.
This audio is a song with singing over instrumental music.
A full music track with prominent vocals, drums, bass, harmony, and produced instrumental backing.
A vocal-led recording where singing or spoken phrases sit clearly over a musical arrangement.
hard_negatives: This audio is speech or spoken word without music.
This audio is an instrumental electronic dance track.
This audio is isolated a cappella vocals without instrumental backing.
This audio is beatless ambient instrumental music.

prompts: instrumental electronic music.
This audio is an instrumental electronic dance track.
This audio is an instrumental club track.
An instrumental club track focused on drums, bass, rhythm, and production texture.
An electronic dance track with groove, low-end, percussion, and atmosphere as the main elements.
hard_negatives: This audio contains prominent singing vocals.
This audio is speech or spoken word.
This audio is rap music with spoken vocals.
This audio is a vocal pop song.

prompts: acoustic organic music.
This audio is an acoustic or organic music track.
This audio contains organic instruments and natural percussion.
A warm organic track with acoustic instruments, hand percussion, natural timbre, and live-sounding texture.
A music recording with organic drums, plucked strings, wood tones, and earthy acoustic resonance.
hard_negatives: This audio is synthetic electronic dance music.
This audio is drum machine techno.
This audio is ambient synthesizer drone music.
This audio is vocal pop with glossy electronic production.

prompts: ambient drone.
This audio is an ambient drone track.
This audio is beatless ambient music.
A slow atmospheric track with sustained tones, soft textures, minimal rhythm, and spacious ambience.
An ambient electronic piece with drones, evolving pads, field-like texture, and a calm immersive atmosphere.
hard_negatives: This audio is a breakbeat club track with syncopated drums.
This audio is peak-time techno with driving kick drums.
This audio contains prominent singing vocals.
This audio is acoustic folk music.
